title: I HATE FLESH: Reborn (IHFR)
description: A vanilla friendly mod introducing flesh, in a horror styled way!
body:
**IHFR is currently in early alpha and requires geckolib!** 
 
 **This mod is NOT compatible with certain weapon & power mods**
 




Do you want to experience vanilla friendly horror? 

IHFR does just that! Whenever you go to sleep there is a slim chance that you have a nightmare! These nightmares last five minutes! Once you die in it, you die in the game too! How fun is that...

IHFR also introduces new uses for flesh! like.... Flesh blocks, flesh mobs, flesh items, flesh foods, you get the point!

![A small bit of the features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e6370ed570542203290829f01fc106692a8fd36.png)

![Nightmare Dimension](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40be9bc2ceb06a347737ec3879c87e556b66b433.png)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/6cJDubzUqmI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>















Updates :

**The hooks and tacos update**


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Added:


Corporeal Hook

Osseous hook

Flesh burger

Flesh taco


</details>




**The Very Nightmare-ish update**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>


Added:

-Corporeal Hook is now renamed to Corporeal Handheld Harpoon and has a brand new animated 3d model

-Barnacle sounds have been changed to more passive ones

-Reworked the start up screen

-Slight Balancing

-Added Nightmares 

-Added the carnage, a new dimension currently only consisting of one biome, the nerval forest
You enter it by having nightmares.

-Added a lot of new blocks

-A couple more things I forgot


</details>


Any questions can be answered on [Discord](https://discord.gg/C3T9xTZE6S)
